title: Compost Pledge (Design Concept)
description: Concept: prove weekly recycling events via Merkle inclusion + range proof. Not yet implemented.

designInputs.eventRoot: Merkle root of recycling event hashes
designInputs.leafIndex: Position of the user's event in the tree

designOutputs.membership: Boolean — leaf is a valid member of the Merkle tree
designOutputs.rangeFlag: Boolean — count meets weekly threshold without revealing exact count

verification: Not yet implemented. Would require a Merkle proof circuit and range constraint.
note: Design concept only. This file documents the intended proof format for future implementation.
